reviews.comment:
Un lugar necesario para llegar a la cordillera

(Translated by Google)
A necessary place to reach the mountain range
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBenEtcDBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Solo para pasar la noche. Para almuerzo o cena se puede comer en la estación de servicio. El baño no tiene bidet y nos toco una habitación con un olor desagradable toda la estadía.

(Translated by Google)
Only for an overnight stay. Lunch or dinner is available at the gas station. The bathroom doesn't have a bidet, and we had a room with an unpleasant odor the entire time we stayed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNWVhM3pBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Infaltable los sandwiches de jamon crudo de ese lugar. Un clasico.

(Translated by Google)
The prosciutto sandwiches at that place are a must. A classic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3Z0xMSVNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
Good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNndDRDa0pnEAE

reviews.comment:
Para todos los transeúntes de la ruta 25, tienen que probar el mítico sándwich de crudo y manteca en pan casero, otra opción es el de jamón y manteca... Se recomienda con unos buenos mates. Un poco caro, pero es tradicional.

(Translated by Google)
For all passersby along Route 25, you have to try the legendary raw meat and butter sandwich on homemade bread. Another option is the ham and butter sandwich... It's recommended with a good mate. A bit pricey, but it's traditional.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBdGJ1TU53EAE

reviews.comment:
Gran opción para quedarse de paso. Faltan más opciones que inviten a quedarse en este lugar también llamado "Corazón de Chubut"

(Translated by Google)
A great option for a stopover. More options are needed to encourage people to stay in this place also known as the "Heart of Chubut."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbXRMc3BRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los sandwiches están sobrevalorados. El café pálido y sin sabor. Lo justo para repostar combustible, agua para el mate y seguir hacia destino.

(Translated by Google)
The sandwiches are overrated. The coffee is pale and tasteless. Just enough to refuel, get water for mate, and continue on to your destination.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3ak1ubERBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es una estación  de pueblo pequeño con los servicios necesarios para el viajero, personal muy atento, baños limpios y ubicada casi sobre la ruta, muy comoda...

(Translated by Google)
It's a small-town station with all the necessary services for travelers, very attentive staff, clean restrooms, and located almost directly on the highway—very convenient.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRME9pOHZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen combustible, autoservicio limpio, precio y mitad de camino

(Translated by Google)
Good fuel, clean self-service, good price, and halfway there
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneXJ1NUJBEAE
